mapper.select: SELECT r.reviewId, r.writerId, u.nickname, r.rating, r.content, r.createdAt FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON r.writerId=u.userId WHERE r.meetingId=#{meetingId} ORDER BY r.createdAt DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews( meetingId, writerId, rating, content ) VALUES( #{meetingId}, #{writerId}, #{rating}, #{content} )
